query:
SELECT
                    id AS "id!",
                    project AS "project!",
                    priority AS "priority!",
                    status AS "status!",
                    description AS "description!",
                    created_at AS "created_at!",
                    updated_at AS "updated_at!",
                    source AS "source?"
                FROM tasks
                WHERE project = ?1 AND (?2 = 1 OR status = 'open')
                ORDER BY created_at DESC
